name: create_directory
description: Creates a new directory (and any necessary parent directories) at the specified path within the project. Use this to set up new folder structures for components, modules, assets, etc.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project.

directory_path.description: The relative path from project_path for the new directory to be created. Example: 'src/assets/images' or 'components/ui'.

hints.description: This tool is idempotent (if the directory already exists, it usually does nothing or confirms existence) and non-destructive in the sense it doesn't delete anything, but it does create new file system entities.
